top_signals.title: Nickel Spikes After Report of Indonesian NPI Production Cut
top_signals.summary: Nickel prices spiked following a report of further output cuts in Indonesia, the top producer of the metal.

top_signals.title: Glenfarne, ConocoPhillips Ink Alaska LNG Gas Supply Deal
top_signals.summary: Glenfarne Alaska LNG and ConocoPhillips Alaska have signed a gas sales precedent agreement to supply natural gas from Alaska’s North Slope for Phase One of the Alaska LNG project.The 30-year agreement will secure sufficient natural gas volumes…
